name: Quote + Image
description: Quote text overlaid on related artwork. Combines visual context with quoted material. Use when the art is relevant to the quote.
trigger: narration has quotation marks AND a related artwork exists with matching concepts

artwork.note: Art is dimmed to make text readable

ken_burns.note: Very gentle — too much motion makes text hard to read

usage_rules.prefer_over: quote-card when art has direct conceptual match to quote content
usage_rules.avoid: busy art with fine detail that makes text unreadable
